name: AI Face Swap Vendor-Published Claims Snapshot v1
purpose: Normalize selected public statements on official face-swap product pages so readers can identify fields that still require direct verification.

method.selection: The six non-FaceSwapAI providers were the first visible product domains in a signed-out, US-English Google search for 'ai face swap' reviewed on 2026-07-13. FaceSwapAI is included for first-party disclosure and comparison context.
method.observation: One named official page per provider was manually reviewed. FaceSwapAI uses its versioned first-party product-facts endpoint. Statements were paraphrased into common fields without creating an account or generation task.
normalizationRules: A published claim is recorded as a claim, not as independently verified product behavior.
Not stated means the reviewed URL did not clearly state the field; it does not mean the feature or policy is absent.
Conflicting statements on the same reviewed page are retained instead of choosing one as correct.
Free, no sign-up, no watermark and deletion language can have provider-specific scope and definitions.
Media support records what the reviewed page presented, not every product the provider may operate.

fieldDefinitions.mediaStated: Media workflows presented on the reviewed source page.
fieldDefinitions.freeAccess: The reviewed page's free-use statement and any visible scope.
fieldDefinitions.accountRequirement: Whether the reviewed page stated that sign-up or an account is required for the claimed free workflow.
fieldDefinitions.watermark: Whether the reviewed page stated that a watermark is present or absent, including any visible scope.
fieldDefinitions.taskFileRetention: The reviewed page's statement about uploaded or generated task-file deletion, not account, billing, security or legal records.
fieldDefinitions.conflicts: Statements on the reviewed page that cannot both define one unambiguous boundary.

freeAccess.summary: One eligibility-based photo trial is available to an eligible account; it is not unlimited free generation.

accountRequirement.summary: Generation requires sign-in, a verified email address and consent confirmation.

watermark.summary: The eligible photo-trial result includes FaceSwapAI.com and the complete, unmasked account email. A newly generated paid result includes neither.

taskFileRetention.summary: Uploaded and generated task files are scheduled for deletion after 24 hours and may be removed earlier; upstream provider policies also apply.

freeAccess.summary: The reviewed page claims free use without a daily limit.

accountRequirement.summary: The reviewed page claims no login is required.

watermark.summary: The reviewed page claims no watermark.

taskFileRetention.summary: The reviewed page says files are regularly deleted after one day.

freeAccess.summary: The reviewed page claims free photo face swaps.

accountRequirement.summary: The reviewed page claims no sign-up is required for photo face swaps.

watermark.summary: The reviewed page claims no watermark on photo face swaps.

taskFileRetention.summary: The reviewed page says uploads and results are retained for one day.

freeAccess.summary: The reviewed page claims five free image swaps per day and describes video face swap as paid.

accountRequirement.summary: The reviewed page did not clearly state the account requirement for the claimed free image workflow.

watermark.summary: The reviewed page did not clearly state trial or free-output watermark behavior.

taskFileRetention.summary: The reviewed page did not clearly state a task-file retention period.

freeAccess.summary: The reviewed page claims free photo face swaps.

accountRequirement.summary: The reviewed page claims no sign-up is required for free photo face swaps.

watermark.summary: The reviewed page claims no watermark on free photo face swaps.

taskFileRetention.summary: One section says history is deleted after one day, while a FAQ answer says uploaded and generated images are deleted within 48 hours.

conflicts: The reviewed page gives both a one-day and a within-48-hours deletion statement.

freeAccess.summary: The reviewed page did not clearly state a free-use boundary.

accountRequirement.summary: The reviewed page did not clearly state the account requirement.

watermark.summary: The reviewed page did not clearly state output watermark behavior.

taskFileRetention.summary: The reviewed page says uploads and results are deleted after 48 hours.

freeAccess.summary: The reviewed page presents the photo face-swap workflow as free.

accountRequirement.summary: The reviewed page did not clearly state the account requirement.

watermark.summary: The reviewed page did not clearly state output watermark behavior.

taskFileRetention.summary: The reviewed page says uploaded images are promptly deleted.

limitations: The snapshot covers one reviewed official page per provider and can miss details published elsewhere.
No non-FaceSwapAI account was created and no generation, payment, download, API, privacy-request or support-response test was performed.
The dataset does not compare output quality, speed, reliability, safety enforcement, total cost or current availability.
Vendor pages and product behavior can change after the observation date; reopen each source before relying on a field.
Inclusion is not an endorsement, and omission of another provider is not a negative assessment.
